step_rationale: Matrix protease; atherosclerosis progression marker; expressed in macrophages and contributes to fibrous-cap degradation.
mechanism: Cathepsin D degrades extracellular-matrix proteins in atherosclerotic plaques and mediates macrophage apoptosis post-MI, influencing plaque stability and myocardial remodeling.

references.title: Plasma Protein Profile Associated With a Family History of Early-Onset Coronary Heart Disease.
A combined analysis of bulk RNA-seq and scRNA-seq was performed to investigate the molecular mechanisms associated with the occurrence of myocardial infarction.
Identification of monocyte-associated genes as predictive biomarkers of heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
Lysophospholipids as Predictive Markers of ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction (STEMI) and Non-ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction (NSTEMI).
Extracellular matrix proteomics identifies molecular signature of symptomatic carotid plaques.
Quest for novel cardiovascular biomarkers by proteomic analysis.
